all_updates_rule.description: Defines the configuration for sending notifications for all budget updates, including thresholds and recipient details.

amount.description: Defines the monetary threshold for the budget, specifying the maximum spend limit in the billing account.
amount.type: list(object({last_period_amount: optional(bool),specified_amount: list(object({currency_code: optional(string),nanos: optional(number),units: optional(string)}))}))

billing_account.description: Specifies the billing account ID to associate with the budget, must be in the format of a valid Google Cloud billing account.

budget_filter.description: Defines criteria to filter resources and services for the budget, such as project, labels, or services to include in budget calculations.
budget_filter.type: list(object({calendar_period: optional(string),credit_types: optional(list(string)),credit_types_treatment: optional(string),labels: optional(map(string)),projects: optional(list(string)),resource_ancestors: optional(list(string)),services: optional(list(string)),subaccounts: optional(list(string)),custom_period: list(object({end_date: list(object({day: number,month: number,year: number})),start_date: list(object({day: number,month: number,year: number}))}))}))

display_name.description: Name to identify the billing budget, must be unique within the billing account.

ownership_scope.description: Defines the scope of resources to monitor, either within a single project or across multiple projects within a billing account.

threshold_rules.description: Defines the percentage thresholds for budget notification triggers, requiring values between 0 and 1 to specify when alerts should be sent.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations, with specific time limits for each action.
